info.title: Presensi Event Alumni Pesantren API
info.description: API documentation for Presensi Event Alumni Pesantren system.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of all alumni users. Admin only.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search by name, email, or angkatan

post.description: Creates a new alumni account manually by admin.

get.description: Returns detail of a specific alumni user by ID. Admin only.

put.description: Updates data of a specific alumni user. Admin only.

delete.description: Permanently deletes an alumni user by ID. Admin only.

patch.description: Approves, rejects, or deactivates an alumni user. Admin only.

403.description: Admin user status cannot be changed

get.description: Returns list of all admin activity logs including user actions. Admin only.

put.description: Changes the password of the currently authenticated admin user.

post.description: Sends WhatsApp broadcast to alumni. Target options: "all" = semua alumni, "registered" = yang sudah daftar event ini, "custom" = nomor pilihan manual.

target.description: all = semua alumni | registered = yang sudah daftar event ini | custom = input nomor manual

400.description: Broadcast failed atau tidak ada penerima

get.description: Returns preview pesan WA dan jumlah penerima berdasarkan target.

parameters.name: numbers[]
parameters.description: Nomor tujuan untuk preview target custom. Bisa dikirim berulang, contoh numbers[]=081234567890&numbers[]=628987654321.

422.description: Event category is still used by events

get.description: Returns paginated list of all events. Admin only.

post.description: Creates a new event and auto-generates a QR code. Admin only.

get.description: Returns detail of a specific event including attendance count.

put.description: Updates event data. QR token is not affected. Admin only.

delete.description: Deletes an event and its QR code image. Admin only.

patch.description: Toggles event status between active and inactive. Admin only.

get.description: Returns list of alumni who attended a specific event. Admin only.
Returns list of alumni who registered for a specific event. Admin only.
Returns active QR code data for a specific event. Admin only.

404.description: Event or QR code not found

post.description: Generates a new QR code for a specific event. Previous active QR code will be deactivated. Admin only.

get.summary: Display active event QR Code image
get.description: Returns the active QR Code SVG image of a specific event directly in browser. Admin only.

404.description: Event or QR code image not found

get.description: Returns list of notifications for the authenticated alumni user.
Returns the count of unread notifications for the authenticated alumni user.

patch.description: Marks a specific notification as read for the authenticated alumni user.
Marks all unread notifications as read for the authenticated alumni user.

post.description: Creates a pending alumni account that requires admin approval before login.

message.example: Registrasi berhasil. Akun Anda menunggu persetujuan admin.

post.description: Authenticates user credentials and returns an access token.
Sends a password reset link to the user email when the account exists.

message.example: Jika email terdaftar, link reset password akan dikirim.

post.description: Resets user password using the token sent to email.

message.example: Password berhasil direset. Silakan login dengan password baru.

post.description: Revokes the current user access token.

get.description: Returns the currently authenticated user data.

put.description: Updates the authenticated alumni profile data.
Changes the password of the authenticated user. Revokes all other tokens except current one.

422.description: Validation error or incorrect current password

post.description: Uploads a new profile picture for the authenticated user.

delete.description: Removes the profile picture of the authenticated user.

post.description: Alumni scans QR code to record attendance. Validates event status, time window, and prevents double scan.

422.description: QR token is invalid, inactive, or not yet valid

message.example: Kamu belum terdaftar di event ini

get.description: Returns the attendance history of the currently logged-in alumni.
Returns list of active events available for registration.
Returns detail of a specific event including quota and registration status.

post.description: Alumni registers for an event. Checks quota availability and prevents duplicate registration.

delete.description: Alumni cancels their registration for an event.

get.description: Returns list of all users for user management. Admin only.

put.description: Updates user information including name, email, role, and status. Admin only.

delete.description: Permanently deletes a user and revokes all their tokens. Admin only.

get.description: Returns current WhatsApp API configuration including provider, API URL, sender number, and connection status. Admin only.

put.description: Updates WhatsApp API configuration. If api_token contains masked value (***), existing token is kept. Admin only.

post.description: Tests WhatsApp API connection with provided or saved configuration. Can test with temporary config without saving. Admin only.
